text: Reproduced the issue — looks like a cookie SameSite problem. Going to try SameSite=None with Secure next.
That should work. Make sure we only set Secure in production so local dev still works over http.
Good point. Pushed a fix to the branch, running it through QA now.
Profiling confirms N+1 queries when loading tags. We should use Prisma's include with a single query.
Pagination subtask is in flight. Should cut initial load time by 70% based on local testing.
Finished the first pass. Dark mode contrast looks much better now across all pages.
First round of wireframes shared in Figma. Would love feedback before I spend more time on visuals.
Looking great! Can we make step 2 optional? Users can always fill it in later from settings.
Early prototype working. Quality is decent for the initial experiment.
